name: Don Henley
abstract: Donald Hugh Henley (born July 22, 1947) is an American singer, songwriter and musician. Henley is a founding member of the Eagles, serving as a songwriter, drummer, and vocalist for the band.

concerts.label: Rainforest Foundation Benefit Concert
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Catherine Russell
about_quotes.evidence: And Don Henley, all kinds of people. And that’s fun. I mean it’s really, really fun. And these are the people that I learned how to sing back-up from, because we were in the studios for many, many years doing many recordings.
about_quotes.doc_title: Catherine Russell interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, October 26, 2018
